mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reward_purchases (id, reward_id, buyer_id, family_id, point_transaction_id, status, notes, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{rewardId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{buyerId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{familyId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{pointTransactionId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{status, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.RewardPurchaseStatusTypeHandler}, #{notes}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, reward_id, buyer_id, family_id, point_transaction_id, status, notes, created_at, updated_at FROM reward_purchases WHERE buyer_id = #{buyerId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, reward_id, buyer_id, family_id, point_transaction_id, status, notes, created_at, updated_at FROM reward_purchases WHERE family_id = #{familyId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at DESC
